docs.title: Vybe Packages
docs.text:
We have a Github Actions pipeline that builds, tests and publishes to Clojars for each OS, each has a suffix for its version, check below:

  • OSX universal
  • io.github.pfeodrippe/vybe {:mvn/version "0.7.444-macos-universal"}
  • Linux (x64)
  • io.github.pfeodrippe/vybe {:mvn/version "0.7.444-linux-x64"}
  • Windows (x64)g
  • io.github.pfeodrippe/vybe {:mvn/version "0.7.444-win-x64"}

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text:
(defn- ->comp
  [wptr v]
  (or (get builtin-entities-rev v)
      (vp/comp-cache (:id (-get-c wptr v VybeComponentId)))
      (eid wptr v)))

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text: You must use at least Java 22 as we use the new Java foreign's API (aka project Panama).
